name: Chocolate Cinnamon Crinkles
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a cookie sheet.
3. Mix all ingredients until the dough forms.
4. Drop dough by rounded teaspoonfuls, about 2 inches, onto the prepared cookie sheet.
5. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until set.
6. Allow cooling for 2 minutes before removing from the cookie sheet.
7. Store cookies tightly covered.
High Altitude (3500 to 6500 feet): Decrease sugar to 2/3 cup. Refrigerate remaining dough while baking the first batch of cookies.
